# ELASTIC N.V. (ESTC) — Bull vs Bear — 2026-06-30 — $56.90

## Why it fell 41% from $96
Five compounding forces: (1) Elastic Cloud revenue decelerated to single-digit growth vs 20%+ prior;
(2) three straight "beat-and-drop" quarters — market punished decelerating guidance, not misses
[TIKR Nov 24 2025; StockStory Feb 26 2026]; (3) 2024 sales reorg (PLG→enterprise) hangover; (4) "AI eats
software" sector de-rate [hightechinvesting.substack.com Mar 6 2026]; (5) Apr 2026 tariff selloff to 52-wk
low $42. EV/Rev compressed ~75% (12-15x → ~3.4x).

## Bull / catalysts (1-2yr)
- AI WINNER thesis: Elasticsearch = the retrieval layer for RAG (hybrid BM25 + dense + sparse via ELSER);
  one platform = search + observability + SIEM, vs standalone vector DBs (Pinecone). Oct 9 2025: bought
  Jina AI + launched Inference Service + $500M buyback [Benzinga Oct 9 2025]. June 2026: bought Deductive AI
  ~$85M for AI observability [TechCrunch Jun 18 2026]. 600+ large customers on AI features.
- Leading indicators turning UP: CRPO (NTM backlog) +20% YoY to $1.2B; RPO +28% to $1.98B; net expansion
  112% [TIKR May 31 2026]. Bookings precede revenue by 1-4 quarters.
- Margin inflection: Q3 FY26 first GAAP op profit; FY27 guide ~19% non-GAAP op margin; ~17.5x fwd non-GAAP
  P/E; 7.75% FCF yield — value stock dressed as tech.
- SIEM displacement of Cisco/Splunk: two Q2 FY26 wins >$20M TCV each.

## Bear / value-trap
No PROOF yet that AI workloads re-accelerate Cloud revenue (still single-digit). OpenSearch fork narrowing
the edge (Apache-2.0, agentic AI in v3.2). Datadog winning observability (DDOG 20%+ growth, 15-20x rev vs
ESTC ~3x). Microsoft Sentinel/CrowdStrike bundle pressure in security. Q3 FY26 FCF -46% YoY (timing, but
unexplained deferred-rev decline). 5 of 6 analysts CUT targets after Q4 (consensus ~$68-80).

## Verdict: SPECULATIVE HOLD / TACTICAL ADD <$58 — NOT EXIT. Conviction 3/5.
The prior EXIT call was right about the CHART, wrong about the BUSINESS. "Dead money" requires no catalyst;
there IS one ~8 weeks out (Q1 FY27 earnings ~Aug 28 2026). Owner's "good tech doesn't go away" instinct is
correct — Elasticsearch incumbency at 50%+ of Fortune 500 isn't replaced by a ChatGPT wrapper.
- Re-entry/add confirmation: Q1 FY27 revenue >$470M AND Cloud growth re-accelerating >12% YoY.
- Bear kill-switch: net expansion rate <108% in Aug → validates dead-money, $42 revisitable.
- Takeout optionality: named as a strategic target (IBM/Salesforce chatter); SA Dec 2025 pegs $85-100/sh.

*Educational analysis, not financial advice. Sources cited inline.*
